title: derris brevipes var. brevipes
intro: Derris brevipes var. brevipes, also known as the short-stemmed derris or short-stemmed Derris, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to tropical Asia. The plant contains rotenone, a toxic compound with medicinal properties, which has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Derris brevipes var. brevipes include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Derris brevipes var. brevipes can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, and has also been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties.
